description: Create a custom OpenSearch index template named 'wazuh-custom-alerts' in the Wazuh Indexer (https://localhost:9200) using credentials admin / SecretPassword. The template must use index patterns ['wazuh-alerts-custom-*'], priority 50, and settings for number_of_shards (1), number_of_replicas (0), and refresh_interval ('30s'). Include mappings in the properties for 'threat.enrichment.source' (keyword), 'threat.enrichment.score' (float), and 'threat.enrichment.timestamp' (date). Save the full JSON response from the API verifying the template's creation to /home/ga/index_template_result.json.
